.mirror.yaml:
repos:
  - source: https://github.com/George-Ogden/linter
    files:
      - LICENSE
  - source: https://github.com/George-Ogden/dbg
    files:
      - debug/__init__.py
      - _debug/__init__.py
config.yaml:
repos:
  - source: https://github.com/George-Ogden/linter
    files:
      - LICENSE
  - source: https://github.com/George-Ogden/dbg
    files:
      - debug/__init__.py
      - _debug/__init__.py
_debug/__init__.py:
from .builtins import install, uninstall
from .config import CONFIG
from .debug import dbg
from .format import pformat, pprint

__all__ = ["CONFIG", "dbg", "install", "pformat", "pprint", "uninstall"]
debug/__init__.py:
from _debug import CONFIG, dbg, install, pformat, pprint, uninstall

__all__ = ["CONFIG", "dbg", "install", "pformat", "pprint", "uninstall"]
